title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese presents three strategies for improving productivity with Claude Code: knowledge bases, auto-research, and context engineering. The video claims to distill Andrej Karpathy's approaches to 10x output when working with Claude for code generation.
